rounds: Two weeks of the same story — showing up, going through the motions, wearing the stuff. That's actually not nothing, that's baseline held. But the Apollo ring moment? That one went to the Joy Police. A colleague handed you an open door and you closed it yourself.
pattern: They're not taking the stuff away — they're just making sure nobody finds out what it means.
focus: One real answer about the ring — even a partial one — to one real person
